data.description: Add structured --output json to the lifecycle commands so callers stop id-scraping. create -> {id,alias,title}; claim -> {ticket_id,status,assignee}; transition/reopen -> {ticket_id,from,to,newly_unblocked[]}; delete -> {ticket_id,deleted,newly_unblocked[]}. Preserve exit codes (esp. 10). Reuse the centralized output helper from T2.
data.title: T3: add --output to lifecycle/result commands (create/claim/transition/reopen/delete)
